chunks.title: God's Majesty and Creation of Earth
chunks.reason: Describes God's splendor and the establishment of the earth and waters.

chunks.title: Provision for Nature and Animals
chunks.reason: Catalogs God's provision of water, plants, and food for various creatures.

chunks.title: God's Wisdom and Sustenance of Life
chunks.reason: Reflects on the diversity of sea life and the cycle of creation and renewal.

chunks.title: Praise and Petition for the Wicked
chunks.reason: Concludes with a personal vow of praise and a wish for the removal of sinners.
